steps.title: Use the goal
steps.content: The student wants an example of a dinosaur fossil specimen's nickname. The effective sentence must therefore name a specific nickname rather than only describe fossil specimens or museums generally.

steps.title: Reject general facts
steps.content: B identifies a fossil specimen but gives no nickname. C only says many specimens have nicknames. D mentions a nickname indirectly but never names one. The remaining choice gives Sue as the specific nickname of the fossil specimen. The answer is A.
